raw_input:
PRODUCT SPEC — NovaPay Digital Savings Account

Product Name: NovaPay SmartSave
Category: Digital Savings & Investment Platform
Launch Date: April 2026
Company: NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (SEBI-registered)

PRODUCT OVERVIEW
NovaPay SmartSave is a mobile-first savings account that automatically sweeps
idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering customers higher returns than
traditional savings accounts while maintaining instant liquidity.

KEY FEATURES
- Auto-sweep technology: balances above ₹10,000 automatically invested in
  SEBI-approved liquid funds
- Instant withdrawal: funds accessible within 30 minutes, 24/7
- Zero lock-in period
- Integrated UPI payments
- Real-time portfolio dashboard

FINANCIAL DETAILS
- Savings account interest: 4% per annum (RBI regulated)
- Liquid fund historical average: 6.5-7.2% per annum (last 3 years, source: AMFI data)
- Minimum balance: ₹1,000 (one thousand rupees only, NOT one lakh, NOT ₹1,000,000)
- Auto-sweep threshold: configurable between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE
- SEBI registration: INZ000XXXXXX
- RBI banking licence: partnered with SBM Bank India
- All mutual fund investments through AMFI-registered AMCs

TARGET AUDIENCE
- Urban millennials (25-38 years)
- First-time investors
- Salaried professionals seeking passive wealth growth

COMPETITIVE POSITIONING
- Versus traditional FD: higher liquidity, comparable returns
- Versus other neo-banks: automated investment (no manual action needed)

LAUNCH MARKETS
- Phase 1: Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Delhi NCR
- Phase 2: Tier-2 cities (Q3 2026)

blog_post:
NovaPay SmartSave: A Game-Changing Mobile-First Savings Account

NovaPay SmartSave is a mobile-first savings account that offers innovative features and higher returns compared to traditional savings accounts. NovaPay SmartSave's auto-sweep feature automatically invests idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering higher returns than traditional savings accounts.

**Key Features**

NovaPay SmartSave offers a range of features that set it apart from traditional savings accounts. The account features instant liquidity, allowing customers to access their funds within 30 minutes, 24/7. Additionally, the zero lock-in period and integrated UPI payments make it an attractive option for those seeking convenience. The real-time portfolio dashboard provides customers with a clear view of their investments, enabling informed decisions.

The account's auto-sweep technology automatically invests balances in SEBI-approved liquid funds, subject to applicable laws and regulations. This feature is particularly useful for customers who struggle to maintain a minimum balance or those who want to take advantage of the potential higher returns offered by liquid mutual funds. Historically, liquid funds have delivered returns over the last few years, as per AMFI data. Please note that past performance is not a guarantee of future results. Please note that past performance is not a guarantee of future results.

**Comparison with Traditional Savings Accounts**

While traditional savings accounts offer a fixed interest rate of 4% per annum, NovaPay SmartSave's auto-sweep feature may provide higher returns compared to traditional savings accounts, depending on market conditions. The interest rate is regulated by the RBI, subject to change and may not be competitive in the future. Please note that interest rates are subject to change and may not be competitive in the future. The account's minimum balance requirement of ₹1,000 is also relatively low compared to traditional savings accounts.

**Innovative Technology**

NovaPay SmartSave's auto-sweep technology is configured to automatically invest balances, subject to applicable laws and regulations. customers with flexibility. The account's partnership with SBM Bank India ensures that customers have access to a robust banking infrastructure. The SEBI registration number, INZ000XXXXXX, provides assurance that the account is regulated and secure.

**Consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before investing.**

In conclusion, NovaPay SmartSave is an innovative mobile-first savings account that offers higher returns and convenience. With its auto-sweep technology, instant liquidity, and zero lock-in period, it is an attractive option for those seeking better returns than traditional savings accounts. As with any investment, it is essential to consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before investing in NovaPay SmartSave.

hindi_content: नोवापे स्मार्टसेव, एक मोबाइल-फर्स्ट डिजिटल बचत खाता का परिचय, जो लिक्विड म्यूचुअल फंड्स में लेटेंगे बैलेंस को ऑटोमेटिकली निवेश करता है और उच्च रिटर्न प्रदान करता है। यह नवाचारी उत्पाद शहरी मिलेनियल, पहली बार निवेशक, और नियोक्ता पेशेवरों के लिए उपयुक्त है, जो पासिव वेल्थ बनाने की तलाश में हैं।
tamil_content: நோவாபே சமர்த்த சேவ் என்பது ஒரு தொழில்முறைத் தனிப்பட்ட மொபைல் முன்னேற்றம் மூலம் ஒரு திறன் பரிமாற்றம் சேமிப்பு கணக்கு, இது உள்ளூர் புத்தாக்கத்திற்கு உரிய இளைய தலைமுறையினர், முதல் முறையாக முதலீட்டாளர்கள், மற்றும் தொழிலாளர்கள் சார்ந்த முதலீட்டு வாய்ப்புகளை விரும்பும் முதலீட்டாளர்களுக்கு மேலும் அதிக வருமானத்திற்கு இடையூறற்ற மூலதனத்தை மீள் முறைப்படுத்துகிறது. #NovaPaySmartSave #DigitalSavings #MobileFirst #Investing #WealthCreation"
